pericopes.title: Pathen Chapa Vantil ho sangin achungnungjoi
Pathen mite dia choldo mun khat
Pathen lungset donda jeh a gihsalna

chapters.text: Masang laiyin Pathenin a bung abungin got chom got chomin themgao ho kamin iputeu ipateu heng’ah thu aseiyin,
tulai ni nunung a hin a-Chapan eiho heng’ah thu aseitai; hiche a-Chapatah chu ima jouse gouloa a tun ahitai; chule thilsem jouse jong hi ama khut’a asemsah ahi.
Hiche Chapa chu aloupina vah le aumje kibahpi ama lim tah ahin, athahatna thua ijakai tuh dinga ahin, chonsetna asuthengin chungnunga Lal Chungnungpen jet lamah atoutai.
Chule aman Vantil ho sanga min phajo gou alo bang tah-in amaho sangin achungnung jo tai.
Ijeh-inem itile Vantil ho koipen jah a itih pena; Nangma ka-Chapa nahi. Tunia keiman kahin nahitai,” atia chujongle, “Keima a-Pa kahi ding ahin, Ama ka-Chapa hi ding ahi,” tia asei khah em?
Ahin hiche apeng masapen chu vannoi leiset’a ahinpui kit ding tenga ding chun, “Pathen Vantilte jousen ama chu chibai boh hen,” ati.
Chule Vantilte chung chang thua hi tin aseiye; “Aman Avantil ho hui asosah jin, Alhachate chu meikong asosahjin ahi.
Chapa chung chang thua vang chun hiti hin aseiye; “Vo Pathen, nalaltouna chu Tonsot tonsot geiya um jing jeng ahi; Chule chondihna tengdop chu Nagam tengdop ahi.
Nangman chonphat na-ngailun, Khan giltlou nahon ahi; Naloite chengse chungvumah kipana thao nanutan ahi.
Chule, “Pakai, atil abul’a nangman vannoi leiset bul naphudoh ahi. Chule van ho jong nangma khutsoh ahi.
Hite ho chu mangthah ding ahi. Nangma vang um jing jeng nahi; Hichengse chu Ponsil banga lui ding ahi;
Hite ho chu nangman ponlhe banga Najel lom ding ahi; Hichengse chu Ponsil banga nakhel ding ahi; Nangma vang nabang nahi jinge. Nakum jong bei lou ding ahi.
Ahivangin keiman namelmate nakeng chotpha kaneisah masangsen Kajet lamah tou jingin,” tia Vantil ho koipen jah a asei khah em?
Amaho chengse chu lhacha le lhagao, sochatna goulo dingte ho jenle dinga hinkisoldoh hilou ham?
Hijeh a chu ithu jah chengseu hi lunglut tah a igut cheh dingu ahi; achuti loule ajo le chuchenga kon chun kitolmang get’u hite.
Ijeh-inem itile Vantil ho kama asei thu chu dettah a chule suh khelna le thua nun louna jouse man adoltah cheh a asanuva ahile.
huhhingna loupi hi nahsahmo leu hen eiho iti isochat dingu ham? Hiche huhhingna hi amasa Pakai kama asei, aja hon eiho dinga aphudet ahin,

melchihna le thilmu kidang chule thilbol theina got tamtah toh thoa alung got doltah a Lhagao Theng phatthei kihoma chu Pathenin jong ahettohsahpiu ahi. Huhhingna thupodoh masapen Hijeh chun Pathenin, na-Pathenin,
Ijeh ham itile khonunga hung umding vannoi leiset thu iseiyu chu aman Vantil ho noiyah akoipoi.
Ahinla khat’in mun khat’ah ahettohsah-in; “Mihem chu ipi ham? Nangman nalung viltenin? Chujongle Mihem Chapa chu ipi ham? Nangman navil jingin?
Nangman ama chu Vantil ho sangin Themcha khatbou nanoi nunsah-in ahi; Loupitah-in gun che na Lallukhuh-in najemin ahi; Nakhutsoh jouse chunga Vaipon natungin.

Chule ima jouse abonchan akengphang noiya nakoiyin Anoiya naumsah tai,” tin aseiyin ahi. Chuti chun ijakai aboncha anoiya akoi lou imacha aumtapoi. Ahivangin tu geiyin eihon ima jouse anoiya alutsoh imu hih laiyuve.

Ahin Vantil ho sanga themcha khat anoi nunsah Jesu vang chu imutauve. Pathen lungset vanga mijouse dinga thina atep khah tei ding mong ahin, thina athoh jeh chun choiat na le loupina lukhuh-in akijemtan ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile, ama dinga thil ijakai uma, ama vanga thil ijakai um, ama dinga chu chate tamtah loupina a apuilut jousea chu, ahuh hing nau sempa chun athoh gima asuh chamkim ding thu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile asuthengpa le asuh theng ho chu aboncha khat’a konbou ahiuve. Hijeh chun aman amaho chu sopi sah ding jahcha louvin,
“Keiman kasopite henga Namin seiphongleng ting, Akikhom ho lah a Navahchoi la sange,” atin;
mun chom khatma, Kaginchatna ama jenga Ka-ngah ding ahi,” a tin; chukit man, “Ven, keima le Pathenin eipeh Chapangte hi,” ati.
Chuti ahijeh chun chapangte ho chu thisan le tahsa chang khom ahijeh-u chun, thinaa thina thu neipa, hichu diabol ahi, asuhpoi theina ding le,
thi kichatman a hinlai sungsea soh a umte ho jouse chu ahuhdoh theina dinga amatah jong hichu changa ahitai.
Atahbeh-in aman Vantil ho hu louvin Abraham chilhahte ahujotan ahi.
Hichejeh chun miho chonset thensona dinga, ama Pathen lama dinga thempu chungnung mi khoto tah le tahsan umtah ahina dinga chu, ijakaiya asopite bang banga ahung um ding chu adoltah ahi.
Ajeh chu aman lhepna atoa hesoh genthei athoh jeh chun lhepna toh ho phatna bol’a hu thel ahi.
Hijeh chun van kouna changkha sopi thengte ho, itahsanu Solchah le Thempulen Chunnung Jesu lam chu ha ngaitouvin.
Pathen insung jouse lah a Mose tahsan umtah ahibang chun ama jong apansahpa lama tahsan umtah ahi.
Ajeh chu in sanga in sapa achoiatjoh bangtah a chu ama chu Mose sanga gamchenga loupijo cheh dingdol ahi, tia kisima ahitai.
In jouse chu mi khat sahdoh ahi cheh-in, ahin ima jouse sadohpa chu Pathen ahi.
Chuin khonunga thu hung kisei ding ho hettohsahna dinga, Mose chu Pathen insunga jouse lah a lhacha panga tahsan umtah ahi;
Christa vang chu chapa ahin, ama insung chunga tahsan umtah ahi. Akhon ni geiya ihakat nau le kinepna ikison nau hi ituhdet pouvu le eiho hi ainsung mite ihiuve.
Chuti ahijeh chun Lhagao Thengin asei bangin, Tunia nanghon a-ogin najah uva ahile
Lunghansahna a bang chun Nalungu tahsah hih-un; Gamthip’a kipatep laiya bang chun bol hih-un.
Chukoma chun naputeu napateuvin patepnan eideh-un ahi. Chule kathilbol hokum som li amu’vin ahi.
Hichejeh a chu Hiche Phung mite chunga hi kalung lhai lou ahi; Amaho hi imatih chan a Lung chavaite mong ahiuve; Ahinla amahon Kalampi ahepouve;
Chua kalung hanga Kahahsel ahi; ‘Hite ho kacholngahna a Lut lou ding ahiuve,’ kati ahitai.
Vo sopite ho, ching theiyun, ajo le ijemtin Pathen hinga kona pul lhahna dingin nangho lah a jong tahsanlou lung giloupo um khauvin nate.
Ahin chonset lhep lhah a khat tou lungtah cheh cheh nalah uva aum louna dingin, ‘Tuni kiti phat chu aum lai sungin khat le khat niseh-in kitilkhou touvin.
Ijeh-inem itile eihon ikinep nau tah beh kipana hi akhon ni geiya ituhdet jinguva ihipouvule Christa kikoppi ihiu ahitai.
“Tunia a-ogin najah uva ahile, Lunghan sahna a bang chun nalungu tahsah hih-un,” akitin ahi.
Hiche ati hi athu ajahjouva lunghansah chu koi koi ham? Egypt gama kona Mose khut’a ahinpuidoh ho chengse chu hilou ham?
Chule kum som li sunga alung himona koi chung ham? Gamthip laiya along lum, hiche chonse ho chunga chu hilou ham?
Chule hite ho kacholngah na a lut lou ding ahiuve, tia ahahselna chu koi chung chang thua asei ham? Thu ngailouho chung chang thua hilou ham?
Hichea hin amahon atahsan lou jeh-uva lut thei lou ahitauve, ti chu imu’vin ahi.
Hichejeh chun eiho kichau hite, achuti loule ajo le ama cholngahna a lut theina ding thutepsa aumjeng vangin, nalah uva khat tou chua lut dinga kona athon a um le akilome,

Ijeh-inem itile Kipana Thupha ijah uva akisei chu eihon ijah mong mongu ahitan, amaho jong chutobang ma chu ahi; ahivangin athu jaho toh tahsana akigop lou jeh-u chun athujah-u chu amahon phatchomnan aneitapouve.

Ajeh chu atahsan eiho chengse vang hi cholngahna a chu ilut laiyu ahi; “Kalunghan a kahahsel banga chu, Kacholngahna a lut lou ding ahiuve,” tia asei bang chu ahi; vannoi leiset bul aphudoh til’a aman anatoh ajosohsa ahitah vangin,
mun khat’a aman sagi ni thudol aseiyin, ‘Chuin ni sagi nin Pathen anatoh jousea konin akicholngah tan ahi,’ ati.
Chukitman hikoma chun ahiti sei kit leuve; “Hite ho kachoingahna a Lut lou ding ahiuve,” ati.
Chuti ahijeh chun mi kimkhat cholngahna a alut dingu aumnahlai jeh chun chule masanga Kipana Thupha kisei jasahon ajoplou jeh-uva alut lou jeh-u chun,
khonung sottah nungin, ‘Tuni nikho khat atep kit tan, David kama masanga bang chun, “Tunia nanghon a-o najah uva ahile Nalung tahsah hih-un,” ati kit’in ahi.
Joshuan amaho chu acholngahsah hita hen lang hile, khonunga nikho chom khat thu chu asei lou ding ahi.
Hichejeh chun Pathen mite dingin cholngah nia kicholngahna aum nalai jinge.
Ajeh chu Pathen anatoh a kona akicholngah banga chu acholngah na a lut jong chu anatoh a kona kicholngah ahitai.
Hijeh chun koiman chuche thua nunlou umchan chu athoa aum louna dingin, cholngahna a chu lutna dingin ponpanu hite.

Ajeh chu Pathen thu hi hing jingle natong hat jing ahi, chule hemto chemjam jouse sanga jong hemjo ahi, hinna lhagao gu kisuhtona le lhin hichengse chu sukhen theihel’a sun thei ahi, chule lung gel le lungthim ngaito hetoh paijenjeng thei ahi.
Chule thilsem ama mitmua lang lou imacha aumpoi; ichonnau isuhtouva ilhutna dingpau mitmua chu ima jouse asagohkeo le kihongsa ahi.
Van ho chengse jotpaiya chea Pathen Chapa Jesu thempulen chunnunga inei jeh-u chun itahsan iphonu hi hatuh det jingu hite.
Ajeh chu ihatmonau eihetpia eithohpi phah lou thempu chungnung neiya ihipouve, eibanga imalam jousea lhepna le patepna tohkha a thoh kha a ahijenga jong chonsetna nei louhel joh ineiyu ahi.
Hichejeh chun hepina ichan theina dingule hu ingai komuva huna lungsetna imu theina dingun, hakattah-in lungsetna laltouna chu naiyu hite.
Ijeh ham itile thempu chungnung jouse chu chonset thensona a thilto le gan kithat alhakop theina dinguva mi lah a kona kilachoma mihemte dinga Pathen lam thil’a chu kipansah ahiuve.
Amaho chu ima helou ho le su khelte ho chunga nemheocha lungde thei ahiuve; ajeh chu amahotah jeng jong hatmona-in aum kimvel cheh jiu ahi.
Chuti chu ahin miho dinga alha banga chu amahotah dinga jong chonset thensona a lha lou thei ahipouve.
Chule hiche choiatna chu Aaron banga Pathenin akou lousen koiman ama chamin akilahpoi.
Hiche bang chun Christa jongin thempu chungnung hi dingin amale ama akichoianpoi; ajah a; “Nangma ka-Chapa nahi. Tunia kahin nahi.” tipajoh chun achoiat ahibouve.
Chutima chun mun chom khat’ah; “Melchizedek umdan banga. Tonsot thempu nahi,” tin aseiye.
Ama chun tahsaphea a um lai ni chun thina a kona ama huhdoh theipa heng’ah hapena peng le mitlhi lha a taona le thumna atoh-in, chule a-Pathen gin jeh chun ngaipeh-in aumtan ahi;
Chapatah ahijeng vangin athohna chengsea chu thua nunje kisina ahitai.
Chuin ama chamkimsah soh keiyin aumin, athua nung ho jouse dingin tonsot sochatna bulpi asohtan ahi.
Chule Melchizedek umchan banga thempu chungnung ahi, tin Pathenin asahtai.
Ama thudol chu thu tamtah sei ding kaneiyun, nakolseh tah jeh-un ahilchet jong ahahsai.

Hitih chanpia hi nangho mihil thei nahi dingu thu ahitan, chutitah sangin khat touvin Pathen thubul kipatna jem ho hilleu chun na-ngai kit tauvin ahi; chule anham hilouva bongnoi ngai nalai mitoh nabangtauve.
Bongnoi an a neiya chun, naosen ahijeh-in chonphatna lam thu hetna imacha aneipoi.
Anham vang chu mi kikhan lhit te ho ding bou ahi, chute ho chun ahet theinau chu aman jing jeh-un, ase apha hetkhen in athem lheh tauve.
Chuti ahijeh chun Christa thuhil kipatna api lam donta louvin, chule natoh thisa a kona lung hei le Pathen tahsan,
Baptize chan gotchom chom, chule khut ngap, athisa ho hindoh kit, chule tonsot thutan vaihom thudol lam thuhilna bulphut kit ta louvin, pilhinna lam del’a masotna dingin kihabol’u hite.
Chule Pathenin eiphasah uva ahile hichebou chu ibol dingu ahi.
Ajeh chu khatvei khovah changsa ho chun van thilpeh chu atep khatauvin, Lhagao Theng changa ahitauvin,
chule Pathen thu ngei le khonunga hung soh ding thilbol theina chu atepkhasa ahitauvin;

amaho chu alhuh tah uva ahile, alung heina dinguva semphat thah theihoi ahipouve; ajeh chu amahon Pathen Chapa chu ama tuma thingpel’a khenbeh kit ahiuvin, chule lhangphong tah a taipongin aumsah jiuve.
Ajeh chu leiset’in achunga ju jing go twi tin tang anadona, adinga lei kigitpeh ho ding a nehdol anche louhing apensah ahin, hiche leiset chu Pathena konin phattheina achangin ahi.
Ahin ling phungle ham lingnei apendoh vangle hichu panna bei ahin, chule sapset anaiyin, akhonna chu meiya govam ahi.
Ahin, deitahte ho, chutia kasei vangun nangho umchan chu hiche sanga phajo le huhhinga umnatoh kitho khom hin kagingcha lhehjengui.

Ijeh ham itile nanghon mithengte nanajen leu ahitan; tun jong najenleuvin, hiche Pathen min lama natohgim nau le ngailutna kilanga nalhanau Pathenin asuhmil ding chu, ama chutobanga chondihlou ahipoi.
Chule akhon ni geiya kinepna chamkim kichentah chu mu dingin nahapan ngai bangu chun hapan cheh-un,
thase louvin tahsan le thoh hat vanga thutep mun lo ho chu, amaho chon nung chu jui cheh leu chun, kalungu ahi.
Pathenin Abraham athutep chun kihahselna ding ama sanga lenjo a um lou jeh-in, ama changin akihahsel’in,
“Thon louva keiman nangma phatthei kaboh ding nahi, chule pun jong kapunsah ding nahi,” ati.
Hiti chun aman a-nga hat athoh hatjeh-in thutep ga chu amutan ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile mihon ama sanga chungnungjo chu kihahselna a aneijiu ahi, chule thu kichetna dinga akihahsel’u chu akinelnau jouse kichaina ahi.
Chutobanga chu Pathenin athutep gou lo ding ho chu alung ngaito long lou ahi chu nasacheh tah a vetsah ding lung agot’a kihahsel chu apalaisah ahi.
Pathen jouhoi ahi louna kikhel lou thil ni vanga, eiho kihuhdohna dinga ima sanguva um kinepna kikoi chu tuh dinga lhaiya eihon kitilkhouna nasatah ineina dinguva abol ahi.
Hiche kinepna chu hinna thih hat aiya ineiyu ahi; hichu kichentah, dettah ahin, chule pondal sung lam geiya lut ahi.
Hikom muna chu Jesu anamasa a Melchizedek um chan dungjuiya tonsot thempu chungnung hia eiho dinga analut masa a ahitai.
Hiche Melchizedek, Salem lengpa chu, Chungnung pen Pathen thempu ahin, chule Abraham in leng ho agatha jouva ahung kile kit chun lampia agalamton phatthei agaboh-in ahi.
Ama chu Abraham in thil jouse hop soma hop khat apen ahi. Amin chu amasan chonphat Leng kitina ahin, chuin Salem Lengpa ahi; hichu chamna lungmonna Lengpa kitina ahi.
Ama chu nu neilou pa neilou, chilhah guilhah neilou, ahinkho kipat le ahinkho lhinna bei ahin, Pathen Chapa banga kisem ahin, hiche Melchizedek chu a-imatih chan a thempua um jing ahi.
Lung gel’un ngaitouvin ipului bulpiu Abraham in athilchom aphalai chengse hop soma hop khat apehpa chu itobanga len hitam!
Chule Levi chate lah a thempu mun man ho chun, danthu dungjuiya miho lah a kona, hop soma hop khat lahna ding thu aneiyu ahi;
amaho phung guiya kona akhang gui thu kisimtha loupa vang chun Abraham a konin hop soma hop khat akilah-in, thutep neipatah chu phatthei abohtan ahi.
Chule mineojon achunga mia kona bou phatthei boh amu chu kinelna bei ahi.
Hichea hin hop soma hop khat muho vang chu thina thu noiya um ahiuve; khatjoh hop soma hop khat mupa vang chu hing jing jeng ahi, ti hettohna kineiya ahitai.
Chule hop soma hop khat mupa Levi chun amatah-in Abraham a konin hop soma hop khat apei ti le hen, ti thei ahi;
ajeh iham itile Melchizedek chun apu agalamtoa chu Levi atai sunga umnalai ahi.

Chuti chu ahin, Levi ho themputna chu chamkimsoh kei thei hile @9(ajeh chu chua kona chu mihon chonna danthu amuu ahi)@7@7, Aaron umdan banga kisei louva, Melchizedek umdan banga ding thempu got chom khat umdoh lou ikhohta ding ham?
Ajeh chu thempu akikhel le danthu jong khel tei ding thu ahi.
Aumchan thu kiseipa chu phung chom mi ahi; chuche phunga mi koimacha maicham muna natong aumpoi.
Ijeh ham itile i-Pakaiyu chu Juda phunga penga ahi chu kichentah-in akilange; ahin hiche phung thua chun Mose’n thempuho thudol ima aseipoi.
Chule tahsaphe thupeh danthu dungjuiya hilouvin mantih neilou hinna thahat dungjuijoh ahin,
Melchizedek lim banga thempu chombeh khat hung uma ahile kathu seiyu hi kichen cheh ahi.
Ajeh iham itile hichu hettohsahna chun; “Melchizedek umdan dungjuiyin, ∑Nangma tonsot thempu nahi,” ati.
Ajeh chu ahatmo le phatchomna bei ahi jeh-in chonna dan thupeh amasa chu amangthah tai.
Ajeh iham itile chonna dan thupeh chun imacha asuchamkimpon ahi; ama muna chu kinepna pha chungnungjo kipolut ahitai; hiche chu eihon Pathen kom inailut nau ahi.
Chule achuti jeng vang chun hahsel louva hilou ahijeh chun @9(ijeh-inem itile amaho chu hahsel louva thempua kisema anahitauvin; amavang,
“Pakai chun akihahsel le Alung hei kit lou ding ahi; Nangma tonsot thempu nahi,” tia ajah a seipa hahsel vanga chu Jesu chu hahsel’a thempua ahitai)@7@7.
Chuti tah chu ahijeh-in Jesu chu kitepna chungnungjo jamin a panga ahitai.
Chule thina-in asuhmoa apan jing thei lou jeh-un, amaho mi tamtah thempun anapangin ahi;
amavang chu tonsot geiya um jing ahijeh chun khel louhel thempu mun changa ahitai.
Hijeh chun amavanga Pathen kom nai lutte ho chu, taopeh dinga ama hing jing jeng ahijeh a chu amaho chu huhhing chamkimsoh thei ahi.
Ijeh ham itile chutobang thempu chungnung athena theng, lepthol neilou, boh behlou chonsete lah a kona kisepdoh, van ho sanga chungnungjoa kisema chu eiho dinga kilom mong ahi.

Ama chun aniseh a thempu chungnung ho banga chu, amasa ama chonset thensona a, chujou le miho chonset thensona a, gan kithat alha masah ding chu akin akhohpon ahi; ijeh ham itile aman hichu amatah akilha jeng jeh chun khat veiyin asubulhit sohkeitan ahi.
Ajeh chu danthun apansah thempu chungnung ho chu hatmona nei mihem ahiuve; danthu nunga um hahselna thun apansah vang chu tonsot geiya dinga kisucham kimsoh Chapa ahi.
Chunga thu kisei chengse lah a athupipen hiche ahi, van a chungnungpen laltouna jet lama tou,
chule mihem tundoh hilouva Pakai tundoh Houbuh tahbeh le muntheng lhacha lea pang Thempu Chungnung ineiyun ihiuve.
Thempu chungnung jouse chu thilto le kithensona ganlha dinga kitung cheh ahiuve; chuti ahijeh chun hiche Thempu Chungnung jong hin ikhat khat lha anei tei ding thu ahi.
Ama vannoi leiset chunga anaum hile, thempu hilouhel ding ahi; ijeh ham itile danthu dungjuiya thilto lha dinga chu aum nauvin ahi.

Amaho lhachalea apan nau chu, Mose’n houbuh sah dinga agot laiya Pathenin ahilchah a ajah a, “Ching theiyin, vetkah dinga mol chunga nakivetsah lim bang bang chun bol soh keiyin,’ tia asei banga chu vana thil limdan le ale ahibouve.
Tu vangin kitepna phajo cheh palaiya apan dungjuiya, lhacha mun pha chungnungjoa panga, kitepna chu thutep phajo chunga ahisah ahitai.
Ajeh chu kitepna masah chu themmona beihel hile, aninapa mun ding chu kingaito lou ding ahi.
Ajeh iham itile amaho chu a-oimon; “Veuvin, keiman Israel phung mite le Juda phung mite dinga Kitepna Thah Kasemdoh ding nikho Hung lhung ahitai,’ ati Pakai chun;

Aputeu apateu Egypt gama kona puidoh ding nia Akhut’uva katuh a, Amahotoh kitepna kasemdoh, Hiche kakitepna tobangchu ahitapoi; Ajeh chu amaho kakitep nauvah aum jom pouvin ahi; Chuti ahijeh a chu keiman jong amaho kadonlou ahitai,’ ati Pakai chun.

Hiche nikho ho nunga Israelte toh Kitepna kaphudoh ding chu hiche hi ahi; Ati Pakai chun, Alungthimuva kachondan thupeh peng ting, Chule alung sunguva kasut ding ahi; Chule keima amaho Pathen hing ting, Amaho jong kamite Hi ding ahiuve;
Chule amitakip’in tolsung khat’a Achenpiu le asopite chengu, Pakai chu heuvin,’ tia ahil lou dingu ahitai; Ajeh chu aneopena pat alenpen geiya eihetsoh kei dingu ahitai,
Asuh khelnauva jong kahepi ding ahi, Achonsetnau jong geldohta lou ding kahi,” ati.
Hiche kitepna hi aman athah a atia ahile, amasa chu aluisah ahitai, Chuti chu ahin luiya tehtaa chu, amang ding kon ahitai.
Chule kitepna masa a jong chu Pathen lhacha lea pandan le mun-theng, hiche vannoi leiset’a mun theng anauma ahi.
Ahoubuh semu chu adan masapena chu meivah tunna, dokhang, vetsahna changlhah to uma ahin, hichu Mun Theng atiu ahi.
Chule pondal nina dan sunga chu houbuh Mun Theng Chungnung atiu chu uma ahin;

hikoma chu gimnamtui halna sana maicham le kitepna thingkong sana kilonkhum chu uma ahin, kitepna thingkong sunga chu manna umna, sana bel le Aaron tenggol pahmum, chule kitepna songpheng ni chu uma ahi;
chule achung vuma chu hepi touna lekhua Cherub loupitah ni uma ahin; hiti ho thu chu tun akip akoiyin sei joupou hite.
Chuti chun thil hicheng chu akisemin thempuho Pathen houna lhachale dingin houbuh masa sunga chun alut jingjiuvin ahi;

adan nina sungnunga vang chun thempu chungnung changseh bou kum khat sungin khatvei alut jin ahi; ahivangin ama ding le mihoa ding, het louva achonsetnau thensona ding, thisan chu choi louvin alutjipoi.
Houbuh masa chu aum lai chansea muntheng sunga lutna lam chu kilangdoh lou ahi, tin Lhagao Thengin aphonge.
Chule hichu tu laiya dinga tekahna ahibouve; hiche dungjuiya chu thilto kithensona jong alhajiu ahin, hiti ho chun ase apha hetna lama ahouho chamkimsah thei lou ahi;
neh dan, don dan, kisil gotchom chom-toh tahsa polam thudan jeng ahin, sem-phat kah a dinga anakingaitoa ahibouve.
Christa vang chu khonunga hung um ding thilpha thempu chungnunga hung panga khut’a sah lou, hiche thilsem lah a hilou, alen chungnungjo le gam-chenga chamkimjo houbuh a chu lut ahin,
kelcha le bongnou thisana hilouva, ama thisana Mun Thenga khatveiseh lut’a tonsot geiya lhatdohna kemlou anei ahitai.
Ijeh ham itile kelcha le bongchal thisan chule bongla vutvam kithekhumin bon akisuboh ho atahsa polamu athensah a ahile,
Christa tonsot kemlou Lhagaova nolna beihel’a, ama Pathena kipedoh jenga thisan chun Pathen hing lhachalea pang dinga, thina natoh a kona ase apha nahetnau chu gamchenga asuh theng cheh ding ahi.
Chule hichejeh a ama chu kitepna thah palai hiya, kitepna masa noiya suh khel neiya themmo ho lhatdoh-na a athitah jeh a chu, akikouho goulo ding thutep chu chang thei ding ahitauve.
Ajeh chu kitepna umna a chu kitepna sempa chu athi lounaje um lou ahi.
Ajeh chu thi nungle bou thulhun chu hatjia ahi; athuteppa hinlaise vangin ahatjipoi.
Hichejeh a chu kitepna masa jong chu thisan beiya kiphut det lou ahi.
Mose’n danthu dungjuiya thupeh miho jah a, aseichai phat’in, bongnou le kelcha thisan chu twitoh ponsan toh Hyssop toh alan, lekhabu le miho jouse chu athe khumin,
’Hiche hi Pathenin nangho napeh-u thupeh kitepna thisan chu ahi,’ ati.
Chucheng kalval jongin houbuh chule lhacha le ho manchah chengse jong chu chutima chun thisan chu athekhumin ahi.
Danthu dungjuiya chu ima jouse aboncha thisana suhtheng soh himaiya ahi, chule thisan so louva ngaidamna um lou ahi. Kilhaina gantha banga Christa akithan chonset suhbeiyin aumtai.
Hichejeh chun hichenga chu vana thil lima um chu hitia hi suhtheng dingdol mong ahi, van thil tah tah ho vang chu chucheng sanga longlhenna phajo cheh a suh theng dingdol thu ahi.
Atahbeh lima um khut’a kisa mun thenga Christa alutpon ahi; ahin tun eiho jal’a Pathen anga ding dingin vana alutjotan ahi.
Thempu chungnungin kum tin a ama thisan hilou achoiya Mun Thenga alutji banga chu ama thensona gan lha dinga lut matchet ahipoi;

chuti chu hile vannoi kisemtil’a pat’a aman tamtah vei athoh gim ding ahitai; ahivangin tun aman amatah long lhengin akitohjengin chonset suhbeina dingin tukhang nu nungpen hin khatveiseh ahung kilahtan ahi.
Chule mihemte dinga khatvei thia chujou le thutanna hung um ding chu gotsa ahin;
hiche banga chu Christa jong mi tamtah chonset pomang dinga kitoh ahitan, ani veina a chonsetna beihel’a ama ngah jing ho huhhing dinga hung kilang ding ahi.
Danthu chu khonunga thilpha hung um lima hi umbou ahin, alim tahbeh ahilou jeh chun akum tin a longlhenna alhajiu chun ahin naiho chu achamkimsah joupouvin ahi.
Chuti lou hi le long lhenna alhajiu chu tangta lou ding ham? Ahouho chu khatveiya kisutheng hileu setna ahetnau chu umtalou ding ahi.
Ahinla hicheng chun kum tinin achonset nau ageldohsah jotauvin ahi.
Ajeh iham itile bongchal le kelcha thisana chonset suhbei hoi hilou ahi.
Hijeh chun Christan vannoi leiset’a ahung lut laiyin, “Nangman longlhen le thilto nanadeipon, Ahin keima dingin tahsa neigotpeh tan ahi;
Ganpumgo thilto le chonset thensona longlhenna chun Nanalung lhai tapon ahi;
Chuin keiman, ven keima kahung tai. Lekhabua keima thudola hitin akisune, Vo Pathen, keiman nangma Lung deilam bol dinga hung kahi, kati,” tin aseiye.

Aman hicheng chu aseiyin, ‘Nangman longlhenna le thilto chule ganpumgo thilto chule chonset thensona longlhen chu nanadeipon, hichenga chun lung jong nanalung lhaipon ahi,’ atin; hichu danthu dungjuiya kitoh ahin;
chujouvin, ‘ven keima nangma lung deilam bol dinga hung kahi,’ ati. Hiche anu nungjo hi aphudohna dinga amasajo alahdoh ahitai.
Hiche lungdei lama chu Jesu Christa tahsa akitoa imatih chan a dinga khatveiya akilha jeng vanga chu eiho suhthenga uma ihitauve.
Chule thempuho chengse adingun niseh-in hou lhachalen apangun, imatih chan a chonset sumang theilou longlhen chu avel avel’in alhajiuvin ahi.
Ama vangin chonset thensona longlhen khatseh chu tonsot geiya dingin alhan, Pathen khut jetlama atouvin,
hiche kalse chun amelma ho akeng chotpha akisem masangseuvin a-ngah jingin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile suh thenga um ho chu thilto khatseh-in tonsot geiya dinga achamkimsah ahitai.
Chule Lhagao Theng jongin eihettohsah nauve;

ajeh iham itile; “Chuteng chuche ni nunung le chun Amahotoh kitepna kaphudoh ding chu Hiche ahi, ati Pakai chun; Keiman alung sunguva kachondan thupeh peng ting, Chule alunguva Kasut ding ahi,” tia asei jouvin;
“Chule achonsetnau le asuh khelnau Geldoh taponge,” atikitleuve.
Chutia chu chonsetna chengse ngaidama um ahitan, chonset thensona thilto umta lou ahi.
Hichejeh chun sopite ho, Jesun pondal ajotpaiya atahsa puma hinna lam thah eisempeh uva chu,
Jesu thisan vanga Mun Thenga lut ngamna ineiyu ahin,
Pathen insung chunga kitung thempulen chungnung ineiyu ahin,
chule ase apha ihetnau ilung sunguva aphalou chengse atheh ngima ahitah jeh chun, lung dihtah pun tahsan kichentah-in Pathen kom naiyu hi tin;
itahsan ikinepnau hi long louhel’in tuh det jingu hite; ajeh chu thuteppa chu tahsan umtah ahi.
Chule ngailutna le thilpha bolna lama lung soudohna dingin ki-ngaitopeh chehjiu hite;
abang khat tou chonna bangin ikikhop hai louvin, nikho chu ahungnai tul tul’e, ti ihet chanun, khat le khat kitil khouto cheh jiu hite.
Ajeh chu eihon thutah hetna inei nungun, ihenasa le ijanasan chonset bol leu hen, chonset jal’a longlhenna kikheh umta lou ahin;
thutanna a kichat umtah ngah jinga chule adouho kahvam gam dingkon lungsatna meikong bou uma ahi.
Koi hile Mose danthu nahsahmoa chu ahetoh mini le thum kam sung thua kona hepina beihel’a thia ahi.

Chuti ahile Pathen Chapa akengtoa chotpha chule akisuh thengna kitepna thisan chu atheng louva ngaitoa, chule lungsetna Lhagao nah-sahmoa bola chu nangho lung gel’a hiche sanga chu ichana khoh chung chon talen manding dol’a nakilomsah-um?
Ajeh iham itile ‘Phulah ding chu keiya ahi; keimanbou phupa chu kasah ding ahi; chukit le Pakai chun amite thu atan ding ahi,’ tia hicheng thu seiya chu keihon kaheuve.
Pathen hing khut’a chuh chu kichat umtah ahi.
Ahivangin nanghon masanga khovah namu nunguva hesoh genthei thoh hahsa nathoh laiyu chu geldoh jingun.
Langkhat’a houset le hesoh genthei thoh a vetchah a naumu ahin, alangkhat’a chutobang thoh ho nathoh hujiu ahi.
Ajeh chu nanghon akihen ho jong nanakhotouvin, chule gam chenga phajo le imatih chan a um jing gou naneiyu chu naheuvin, naneiyu kichom chu kipah tah-in nanathoh jeng tauvin ahi.
Hiche-jeh chun chonphat man lentah nei dinga nahakatnau chu pailha hih hel’un.
Ajeh iham itile nanghon thutep chu nasan theina dinguva, Pathen lung deilam nabol’uva ponthotah a nathoh hat ding angaiye.
“Ajeh iham itile chomcha khat joule Ahung dinga chu hung ding ahi; Hung geisang Lou ding ahi.
Kamichonpha vang chu Atahsan vanga hing ding ahi; Chule anung chon vang le Achunga kalunglhai louding ahi,” ati.
Ahin eiho vang manthahna lama nung chon ho lah a mi ihipouvin, Lhagao huhhinga umna dinga tahsan ho lah a joh ihibouvui.
Tahsan hi kinepna thil ho hetchet-na, mu lou thil aum monge, ti photchenna ahi.
Ajeh chu hiche thua hi upahon hettohsahna ananeiyu ahi.
Tahsan vangin vannoi leiset hi Pathen thua kisutoa kisema ahi, ti iheuve; chuti chu ahin, thil kimuho chengse hi thil kilang hoa kona kisem ahipoi.

Tahsan vangin Abel’in Cain sangin thensona longlhen phajo alhan, ama chu michonpha ahi, ti hettohsahna ananeiyin, athilpeh thudol Pathenin ahettohsah-in; chule hiche vang chun ama athisa ahivangin thu aseiye.
Tahsan vangin thina amu louna dingin Enoch chu lah mangin aumtan; Pathenin alah mangtah jeh chun ama chu akimutapon ahi; lah manga aum masangin Pathen lungtoh mitah ahi, ti hettohsahna ananeiyin ahi.
Ahin tahsan beiya vang Pathen lungto hoi ahipoi; ajeh chu Pathen aume, chule ama holte chu toh phat man apei, ti chu ama kom naiyan atahsan dingdol thu ahi,

Tahsan vangin Noah chun mu loulai thilsoh ding thu’ah hilchahna thu amun, Pathen ngaisahna neiyin akichan, ama insung mi huhhingna dingin kong innei khat asan ahi; chule hiche vang chun vannoi themmo achansah-in ama tahsana chonphat chu achangtan ahi.
Tahsan vangin Abraham akikou chun, alo dinga um muna chu lut dingin potdohna ding thun anungin ahi; chule hoilama ache dingjong helouvin akipat’in achedoh jengtan anahi.
Tahsan vangin gamtep gama chun mi gama pem bangin apem jingtan ahi; chuche gamtep chu alopi ding Isaac le Jacob toh pon in’ah acheng khomin anahi.
Ajeh iham itile aman abul nei khopi asemtoh le asadoh Pathen, hichu a-nga jing ahi.
Tahsan vangin Sarah chun jong ateh nungin athuteppa chu tahsan umtah a angaito jeh chun nao vop theina aneitan ahi.
Hichejeh chun athikon khat’a konin van a ahsi jat le twikhanglen kama neldi jat’a tam simsen lou apengdoh jengtan ahi.

Hite ho chengse chu tahsan neiyin athigam tauvin ahi, thutep thilte ho chu achanglou ahitauve, ahivangin hite ho chu gamla tah a pangin amu’vin alemun achibai achibaiyun ahi, chule amaho chu leiset chunga kholjin le gamdang mi ahiu chu aseidoh tauvin ahi.
Ijeh ham itile chutobanga thuseiho chun amaho gamtum ding ahol’u ahi, ti chu aphondoh-u ahi.
Amahon ahung kondoh nau gam chu lunga goa hileu, akile kitna dingu phat gomkom anei dingu ahi.

Ahin tun amahon chuche sanga phajo nomjo khat atup’u ahin, hichu van gam ahi. Hiche jeh a chu amaho Pathen tia kisei ding chu Pathen kijapi lou ahi; ajeh iham itile amaho dinga chu khopi khat gotsa akoi ahi.
Abraham patep’in aumin ahile, tahsan vangin Isaac atoh jengtan ahi; chule kipah tah a thutep changpa chun ajah a,
’Isaac a kona nachilhah kisei ding ahi,’ tia kisei achapa changkhatseh chu peh dingin ago jengin ahi;
ajeh chu Pathenin athi lah a kona jong akaithou thei ahi, ti agel ahi; chule tekah nan ama chu achang kit tan ahi.
Tahsan vangin Isaac’in khonunga hung lhung ding thu’ah Jacob le Esau phatthei aboh-in ahi.
Tahsan vangin Jacob chun athi konin Joseph chapa teni phatthei aboh gel’in ahi; atenggol chunga aki-ngamin Pathen alhaiyin ahi.
Tahsan vangin Joseph’in khonunga Israel chate Egypt gama kona apotdoh dingu thu aseiyin ama gu thudol’ah thu apen ahi.
Mose apenin naosen chu hoi asa lhonin tahsan vangin anu le apan lha thum asel lhonin; chule lengpa thupeh jong akicha lhonpon ahi.
Chuin Mose akikhan lhit phat’in tahsan vangin Pharaoh chanu chapa tia kiminvo ding adan;
aman chomkhat chonset’a nomsah sangin Pathen mitetoh bol hesoh thoh khom ding chu alhengjo tan ahi.
Egypt gama gou jouse sangin Christa ahousetnau chu chungnungjon agel’in ahi; ajeh chu aman tohphat man asan ding lam jeng chu avet ahi.
Tahsan vangin aman lengpa lungsat ding chu kicha louvin Egypt gam adalhan ahi; ajeh iham itile aman mu theiloupa chu amu bangin athoh lhumkei jengin ahi.
Chule asoh masa chengse that chun amaho asuh khah louna dingin, tahsan vangin kalchuh kut asemin, chule thisan thekhum abol’in ahi.
Tahsan vangin amahon tolgo bangin twikhanglen San chu ajot gal kaiyun, Egypt miten chutia bol ding chu agouvin ahile, twiyin achup lih gamtauvin ahi.
Tahsan vangin Jericho khopi kul, ni sagi avel’un ahile, akulpi chu achimtai.
Tahsan vangin Rahab notinun gam ve-lhi ho lung mongtah-in a-in’ah alhunsah-in ahile thua nunglou ho toh amantha tapon ahi.
Akal ipi kasei ding ham? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel chule themgaoho, hite ho thu umchan seisoh kei leng phat’in ato lou ding ahi.
Amaho chun tahsan vangin gamtin loinemin alauvin, chonphat abol’un, keipi bahkai kam ahu’vin,
meihat achen daiyun, chemhema konin asoh chauvin, hatmoa konin ahatdoh-un, galsat’in hattah ahitauvin, apang khom agalteu anojam gamun ahi.
Numeihon amithisa chengu hingdoh kit akimu kittauvin ahi; chule adangho chu thokitna phajo chungnung aneina dinguva, ahuhdoh dingu chu anom pouvin ahile, bol gentheiyin aumtauvin ahi.
Abang kimkhatman elbol le jep athoh-un, bulput le songkul’a khumin patep’in aumun ahi.
Amaho chu songin asep jiuvin, thing’at’in a-at tanun, patep’in aumun, chemjam in athat’un, kelngoi vun le kelvuna kivonin avahleuvin, lhasam le hesoh gentheiyin bolset’in anaumun,
vannoi leiset amaho umnahoi ahipon, gamthip laiya mol le lhang’ah, kolbuh, chule leiko homa avahleuvin ahi.
Hichete ho chun tahsan vanga hettohsahna anei vangun thutep ga achang tapouvin ahi.
Ajeh chu eiho beiya amaho chu suh chamkima aum louna dinguva Pathenin eiho dinga thilphajo khat gotsa akoi ahi.

Chuti ahijeh chun eihon jong hettohsahna meipi nasatah-in eium kim vel jeh-u hin einoh phahsah jouseu le ichunguva kai jing chonsetna hi pai lhau hitin, imasanguva um kilhai tetna lampia hin thoh hattah-in lhaiyu hite;

chule itahsan suhcham kim le lamkai pipuipen Jesu lam kat jingu hite; aman amasanga thanopna a um jeh chun jum le maimohna nahsah louvin, thingpel geiyin athoh lhumkeiyin, Pathen laltouna jet lamah atoutan ahi.
Hijeh chun lhagao lama nalel’uva nalhahdah louna dingun, chonse hon ama douna a nelkalna thu aseiyu thoh lhumpa chu gel’un.
Nang ho chonset douna-in thisan soh leuvin napang hih laiyuve;
chule; “Kachapa, Pakai gimbolna ngaisah louvin Bol lou jenin; Chule aman nasosal tengle Lhahdah nan nei hih hel’in;
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin angailut chu Agimbolji ahi; Chule aman alah achapa chengse chu Ajep jin ahi,” tia chapa houva nahounau tilkhouna chu nanghon nasumil tauvin ahi.
Nanghon nathoh-u chu nakisungse nau ahi; Pathenin achapate bol’a nabol’u ahi; ajeh iham itile apa sungse lou chapa koi ham?
Chate jousen athoh cheh sungsena a chu naum louvu le nangho jaocha nahiu ahi, chate tah hilou nahiuve.
Chuche kalval’in eihon tahsa lama eisungse dingu pate inaneiyun, amaho chu ina ging lheh jiuvin ahi; chuche sanga chu ihinna dinguva lhagaoho Pa thua chu ihanun cheh lou dingu ham?
Amaho chun ni chomcha khat dinga amaho phasah sah a einasungse tahbeh jiu ahin, ama vang chun eiho phatchomna dinga, ama thenna chu ichan theina dinguva eigimboljiu ahi.
Gimbolna jouse hi apet le lung nopna ahipoi, lhasetnan akigelbouve; ahivangin khonung le hichea kon chun chutia gimbol’a umho ding chun aga lungmon umtah chonphat asohjin ahi.
Hichejeh chun nanghon khut kikhai lha le khup ngoite chu je jangun;
chule elbai lamvaite lampia kona nodoh a um louva, boldama aumjohna dingun, nakho lhahna diu lampi kisem jangun.
Mi jouse toh kichamdel’a umna le thenna chu del’un, hiche thenna tailouva chu koiman Pakai chu amulou ding ahi.
Kihongphauvin, ajo le mi khat tou Pathen lungset lhinglel umkhantin; thilkha jung hung dondoh-in sumou vin natin mi tamtah suhboh-in um get’inte.
Ahiloule khatvei neh man a apenpi agou lo ding joh a Esau banga Pathen jalou le akideiya ajonga um get’inte.
Ajeh chu Esau chun khonungin phattheina gou chu lo ding alung got ten’a mitlhi puma gunchutah a ahol vangin lung heina gomkom amu lou jeh-in paiyin aumtan ahi, ti naheuve.
Nangho mol toh khah thei le meiya ka, meivom muthim khopihui,
sumkon gin chule thu kisei oginna a hung nahipouve. Hiche ogin jate ho chun ajah uva thu dang kiseibe louna dingin ataovun ahi;
ajeh chu ganhing jengin jong mol chu atoh khah a ahile, songa selih jeng ding ahi, tia thupeh chu amahon athoh thei louhel ‘u ahi;
chule hiche thilmu chu kichat um behseh jeng ahin, Mose’n, ‘Keima kakicha behseh jengin kakihot hot jengin ahi,’ ati.
Ahivangin Zion mol Pathen hing khopi van Jerusalem, Vantil sang som sangja,
vana amin kisun apeng masaho khopilen le Houbung mi jouse Thutan Pathen, michonpha lhagao suhchamkima umho,
kitepna thah palai Jesu chule Abel’a sanga phatna chungnungjo thusei thisan thekhum hi cheng muna hingjoh chu nahibouvui,

Chingtheiyun, thuseipa chu jopda khauvin nate. Ajeh chu leiset chunga thupepa joplou bon asochat louva ahile, vana kona van thupepa a kon chun kihei mangleu hen, sohcha louhel ding ihiuve, ti hi gamchengin akichenin ahi.
Hichea chu a-oginin vannoi leiset aho ling jeng ahi; tu vangin aman thu atep’in, ‘Keiman khatvei vannoi leiset jengseh hilouvin, van jong kaho ling kit ding ahi,’ ati.
Hichea khatvei kaho ling kit ding ati hi, longlou thilte ho chu aum jing nadinga thil kisem, thil long ho chon mang ding ahi, ti ahetsahna ahi.
Hijeh hin eiho long lou gam changa ihitah jeh-u hin lungsetna neiyu hite, hiche vanga chu eihon gin le ja thoa, Pathen lung lhaina lhacha ipan theiyu ahi.
Ajeh chu eiho Pathen chu kahvam mei ahi.
Sopi kingailutna hi chonjompeh jing hen.
Nanghon maljin phatbol ding chu sumil hih hel’un; ijeh-inem itile chuti bol’a konin mi kimkhat’in het louhel’in Vantil alhunsah-un ahi.
Akihente ho chu akihenpin gel’un lang hejingun; nangho jong tahsa a um nahiu heuvin lang hesoh genthei thohte chu he jingin.
Mijouse lah a kichen hija um hen, chule jalkhun jong suhboh-in umda hen; jon pan le mijitoh jong ho thu Pathen in atan ding ahi.
Sum ngailut lung po hih hel’un; nanei sun’uva chun lung lhaiyun; ajeh chu amatah-in, ‘Keiman nangma itinama jong le lhaponge, changlha jong changlha ponge,’ ati.
Hijeh chun eihon hakat tah-a; “Pakai chu eipanpi ahi, Keima kicha ponge; Mihem in keima I-eilo ding ham?” iti thei dingu ahi.
Pathen thu nahil’uva nachunguva navaipoteu chu geldoh jingun; chule amaho nun le khan a kona sohdoh gel’un lang, amaho tahsan umchan chu tho’uvin.
Jesu Christa chu tuni, janhi, chule tonsot geiyin abang chu abang ahijinge.
Thuhil kidang got chom chom kilhoh mangsah loujenun; lung hi lungset na a phudet aphai; anneh a phudet ding ahipoi, hiti anneh thua chonna lungkhamte ho chun phatchomnan aneidehpouve.
Houbuh sunga lhacha le hon aneh thei lou nau maicham ineiyun ahi.
Thempu chungnungin chonset thensona a Mun Theng sunga achoi lutjiu gancha ho long chu kulpi polama agouvam jiuvin ahi.
Hichejeh a chu Jesun jong ama thisana mihemte suh thengna dinga khopi kotpi polama thina athoh ahitai.
Hijeh chun hungun, ama ahouset nau chu pou hitin kulpi polamah ama hengah cheu hite.
Ajeh iham itile hikoma hin khomun det ineipouve, khonunga khopijoh chu ihol’u ahibouve.
Chuti ahijeh chun ama vangin vahchoina kithoina chu Pathen henga lha jingu hite, hichu ama min phondohna muhho ga ahi.
Ahin phatna bol le thilpeh phal’a kihomdel’a thilbol chu sumil loujen un; ijeh-inem itile chutobang kithoina chunga chun Pathen alung lhai behseh jin ahi.

Nachunguva vaipoho thun nungun, thu seitoh a pang ding ahijeh-u chun, hichu lungnom moa bol louva lung lhaisela abol theina dinguva, nangho lhagao ahon jingu ahi; lungnom mon nachunguvah thu seileu, nangho dinga khoh ding ahi.
Keiho neitaopeh-un ajeh chu keihon ase apha hetna thengtah le ijakaiya kitup tah a chondih tup lung kaneiyui, ti kakihet chenun ahi.
Chule nangho heng lama eikilha vah chehna dinga eitaopeh dinga, nangho atumbeh a kahin ha ngeh bih nahiuve.
Chamna Pathen tonsot geiya um jing kitepna thisana kelngoi chinglen i-Pakaiyu Jesu chu athi lah a kona puidoh kit chun, ama lung got lam bol dingin,
nangho phatna lam jousea suchamkim un; ama mitvet’a alung lhaina lam jousea Jesu Christa vang chun eiho’ah molso hen; loupina atonsot a tonsot geiyin um jing hen. Amen.
Sopite, nahenguva kahung tao ahi, kitilkhou na thu hi angai themun; ijeh-inem itile keiman nangho henga paltana kahinsut ahi.
Isopiu Timothy alhadoh tauve, hichu anaheuvin; ama ahung vah a ahile keima amatoh hung lhon ing ting nangho mutange.
Nachunguva vaipoho le mitheng ho chengse chu kasalam anapeuvin, Italy gam mihon salam napeuve.
Nabonchauva chungah lungsetna um hen. Amen.
